name: Executive KPI Scorecard v2
description: Monthly ops-review scorecard: current vs prior vs same-period-last-year for top 5 metrics, trends + map, and outlier detection.

elements.body:
# Executive KPI Scorecard

Current period vs prior period vs same period last year — top 5 metrics.

name.text: Revenue: Current vs Prior vs LY

columns.formula: Sum([Tx Period/Sales Amount]) - Sum([Tx Period/Quantity] * [Tx Period/Unit Cost])
columns.name: Profit

name.text: Profit: Current vs Prior vs LY

columns.formula: (Sum([Tx Period/Sales Amount]) - Sum([Tx Period/Quantity] * [Tx Period/Unit Cost])) / Sum([Tx Period/Quantity] * [Tx Period/Unit Cost])
columns.name: Margin

columns.formula: Sum([Tx Period/Sales Amount]) - Sum([Tx Period/Quantity] * [Tx Period/Unit Cost])
columns.name: Profit Numer

name.text: Margin: Current vs Prior vs LY
Orders: Current vs Prior vs LY

columns.formula: Sum([Tx Period/Sales Amount]) / CountDistinct([Tx Period/Order Number])
columns.name: AOV

name.text: AOV: Current vs Prior vs LY

columns.formula: (Sum(If([Tx Period/Period Tag] = "Current", [Tx Period/Sales Amount], 0)) - Sum(If([Tx Period/Period Tag] = "Prior", [Tx Period/Sales Amount], 0))) / Sum(If([Tx Period/Period Tag] = "Prior", [Tx Period/Sales Amount], 0))
columns.name: PoP % Change

columns.formula: (Sum(If([Tx Period/Period Tag] = "Current", [Tx Period/Sales Amount], 0)) - Sum(If([Tx Period/Period Tag] = "LastYear", [Tx Period/Sales Amount], 0))) / Sum(If([Tx Period/Period Tag] = "LastYear", [Tx Period/Sales Amount], 0))
columns.name: YoY % Change

columns.formula: If([Months Back] = 0, "Current", If([Months Back] = 1, "Prior", If([Months Back] = 12, "LastYear", Null)))
columns.name: Period Tag

elements.body:
# Trends & Geography

Long-run monthly trends for the top 5 metrics + geographic distribution of revenue.

# Anomalies & Outliers

Stores whose most recent month moved dramatically vs their historical monthly average — biggest movers first.

columns.formula: If(IsNull([Historical Avg]), Null, [Current Month Revenue] - [Historical Avg])
columns.name: Deviation $

columns.formula: If(IsNull([Historical Avg]), Null, If([Historical Avg] = 0, Null, [Deviation $] / [Historical Avg]))
columns.name: Deviation %

layout:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<Page type="grid" gridTemplateColumns="repeat(24, 1fr)" gridTemplateRows="auto" id="page-scorecard">
  <GridContainer elementId="p1-header" type="grid" gridColumn="1 / 25" gridRow="1 / 5" gridTemplateColumns="repeat(24, 1fr)" gridTemplateRows="auto">
    <LayoutElement elementId="p1-title" gridColumn="1 / 25" gridRow="1 / 3"/>
    <LayoutElement elementId="p1-ctrl-date" gridColumn="1 / 9" gridRow="3 / 5"/>
    <LayoutElement elementId="p1-ctrl-region" gridColumn="9 / 17" gridRow="3 / 5"/>
    <LayoutElement elementId="p1-ctrl-product" gridColumn="17 / 25" gridRow="3 / 5"/>
  </GridContainer>
  <GridContainer elementId="p1-kpi-group" type="grid" gridColumn="1 / 25" gridRow="5 / 15" gridTemplateColumns="repeat(24, 1fr)" gridTemplateRows="auto">
    <LayoutElement elementId="p1-kpi-revenue" gridColumn="1 / 6" gridRow="1 / 10"/>
    <LayoutElement elementId="p1-kpi-profit" gridColumn="6 / 11" gridRow="1 / 10"/>
    <LayoutElement elementId="p1-kpi-margin" gridColumn="11 / 15" gridRow="1 / 10"/>
    <LayoutElement elementId="p1-kpi-orders" gridColumn="15 / 20" gridRow="1 / 10"/>
    <LayoutElement elementId="p1-kpi-aov" gridColumn="20 / 25" gridRow="1 / 10"/>
  </GridContainer>
  <LayoutElement elementId="p1-sm-revenue" gridColumn="1 / 6" gridRow="15 / 25"/>
  <LayoutElement elementId="p1-sm-profit" gridColumn="6 / 11" gridRow="15 / 25"/>
  <LayoutElement elementId="p1-sm-margin" gridColumn="11 / 15" gridRow="15 / 25"/>
  <LayoutElement elementId="p1-sm-orders" gridColumn="15 / 20" gridRow="15 / 25"/>
  <LayoutElement elementId="p1-sm-aov" gridColumn="20 / 25" gridRow="15 / 25"/>
  <LayoutElement elementId="p1-pivot-pop" gridColumn="1 / 25" gridRow="25 / 41"/>
  <LayoutElement elementId="tbl-tx-period" gridColumn="1 / 25" gridRow="41 / 55"/>
  <LayoutElement elementId="tbl-tx" gridColumn="1 / 25" gridRow="55 / 69"/>
</Page>
<Page type="grid" gridTemplateColumns="repeat(24, 1fr)" gridTemplateRows="auto" id="page-trends">
  <GridContainer elementId="p2-header" type="grid" gridColumn="1 / 25" gridRow="1 / 4" gridTemplateColumns="repeat(24, 1fr)" gridTemplateRows="auto">
    <LayoutElement elementId="p2-title" gridColumn="1 / 25" gridRow="1 / 4"/>
  </GridContainer>
  <LayoutElement elementId="p2-trend-revenue" gridColumn="1 / 13" gridRow="4 / 14"/>
  <LayoutElement elementId="p2-trend-profit" gridColumn="13 / 25" gridRow="4 / 14"/>
  <LayoutElement elementId="p2-trend-margin" gridColumn="1 / 13" gridRow="14 / 24"/>
  <LayoutElement elementId="p2-trend-orders" gridColumn="13 / 25" gridRow="14 / 24"/>
  <LayoutElement elementId="p2-trend-aov" gridColumn="1 / 25" gridRow="24 / 34"/>
  <LayoutElement elementId="p2-map" gridColumn="1 / 25" gridRow="34 / 52"/>
  <LayoutElement elementId="p2-tbl-tx" gridColumn="1 / 25" gridRow="52 / 64"/>
  <LayoutElement elementId="p2-tbl-store" gridColumn="1 / 25" gridRow="64 / 76"/>
</Page>
<Page type="grid" gridTemplateColumns="repeat(24, 1fr)" gridTemplateRows="auto" id="page-outliers">
  <GridContainer elementId="p3-header" type="grid" gridColumn="1 / 25" gridRow="1 / 4" gridTemplateColumns="repeat(24, 1fr)" gridTemplateRows="auto">
    <LayoutElement elementId="p3-title" gridColumn="1 / 25" gridRow="1 / 4"/>
  </GridContainer>
  <LayoutElement elementId="p3-anomaly-tbl" gridColumn="1 / 25" gridRow="4 / 22"/>
  <LayoutElement elementId="p3-scatter" gridColumn="1 / 25" gridRow="22 / 40"/>
  <LayoutElement elementId="p3-tbl-store-monthly" gridColumn="1 / 25" gridRow="40 / 52"/>
  <LayoutElement elementId="p3-tbl-tx" gridColumn="1 / 25" gridRow="52 / 64"/>
</Page>
